comment:exclude: Test suites are validated by running them (vitest), not by tsc — the colocated src/**/*.test.tsx files use @testing-library/jest-dom matchers whose augmentation does not type-check cleanly under vitest 4 + jest-dom 6. This mirrors the legacy test/ suites, which sit outside include and were never type-checked. Follow-up: wire jest-dom/vitest matcher types so tests can be type-checked too.
